---
title: "Steroid Package Debugging"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r}
devtools::install_local("H:/Myositis/DoseCalculation/SteroidDoseR")
library(janitor)
Sys.getenv("JAVA_HOME")
library(rJava)
library(dotenv)
dotenv::load_dot_env()
library(SteroidDoseR)
library(DatabaseConnector)
```

# Start Test

```{r toy-example}
#| echo: false


# 1. Load the bundled synthetic drug-exposure data
extdata  <- system.file("extdata", package = "SteroidDoseR")
drug_exp <- readr::read_csv(file.path(extdata, "synthetic_drug_exposure.csv"),
                            show_col_types = FALSE)

# 2. Wrap the data frame in a connector
con <- create_df_connector(drug_exp)

# 3. Run the full pipeline in one call
episodes <- run_pipeline(con, method = "baseline")

# 4. Inspect results
episodes[, c("person_id", "drug_name_std", "episode_start",
             "episode_end", "n_days", "median_daily_dose")]
```

# OMOP CDM Database

## Connection

```{r omop-connection, eval=FALSE}
# Not executed automatically — requires a live database and JDBC drivers.
# Set JDBC_DRIVER_PATH before running this chunk manually.
#
# SQL Server with Windows integrated security (JHU example):
connectionDetails <- DatabaseConnector::createConnectionDetails(
  dbms         = "sql server",
  server       = "esmpmdbpr4.esm.johnshopkins.edu",
  pathToDriver = Sys.getenv("JDBC_DRIVER_PATH")
)

omop_con <- create_omop_connector(
  connectionDetails = connectionDetails,
  cdm_schema        = "Myositis_OMOP.dbo",
  results_schema    = "Myositis_OMOP.Results"
)
print(omop_con)   # shows <omop_connector>, Connected: no (lazy connection)
```

## Check connected datbase

```{r check-database}

```
